pi_items.source: Task description explicitly targets the '#general' channel, and export_result.sh hardcodes 'general' for fetching room subscription settings.
Task description explicitly requires 'Desktop Alerts: Mentions', which maps to the 'mentions' API value checked by verifier.py and export_result.sh.
Task description explicitly requires 'Mobile Alerts: Mentions', which maps to the 'mentions' API value checked by verifier.py and export_result.sh.
Task description explicitly requires 'Email Alerts: Nothing', which maps to the 'nothing' API value checked by verifier.py and export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: I confirmed that the task operates on the default '#general' channel, explicitly requiring desktop and mobile notifications to be set to 'mentions', and email notifications to be set to 'nothing', which exactly matches the prompt instructions and the API extraction logic.
